title: Build a React e-commerce dashboard
description: We need an experienced React developer with Node.js backend skills to build a full-stack e-commerce dashboard. Must know MongoDB, REST APIs, and have experience with payment integrations like Stripe.

title: Vue.js frontend for SaaS application
description: Looking for a Vue.js developer to build a SaaS frontend application with TypeScript. Experience with Pinia state management and Tailwind CSS required.

title: WordPress custom plugin development
description: Need a PHP developer experienced in WordPress plugin development. Must understand hooks, filters, WooCommerce integration, and REST API endpoints.

title: UI/UX designer for mobile app
description: Seeking a UI/UX designer to create wireframes and high-fidelity designs for an iOS and Android app. Proficiency in Figma required. Must have experience with user research and prototyping.

title: Brand identity design for startup
description: Need a graphic designer to create complete brand identity including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines for a tech startup.

title: Technical content writer for developer blog
description: Looking for a technical writer with software development background to write blog posts, tutorials, and documentation. Must be comfortable writing about APIs, cloud services, and DevOps practices.

title: Digital marketing specialist
description: Need a digital marketing expert with proven SEO and Google Ads experience. Must be skilled in content strategy, social media marketing, and analytics tools like Google Analytics.
